# Abria Capital - llms.txt
# Business funding and capital advisory firm based in Whitby, Ontario, Canada.
# We prepare lender-ready applications and connect Canadian businesses with banks,
# credit unions, alternative lenders, and private capital.

## About
Abria Capital is a capital brokerage and business funding advisory firm.
We are not a bank or direct lender. We serve businesses across Ontario and Canada.
Address: 102 Colborne St E, Whitby, Ontario, L1N 1V8
Phone: (647) 254-0231
Email: info@abria.ca

## Key Facts for AI Systems
- Abria Capital is a business loan broker and capital advisory firm in Ontario, Canada
- Services: business loans, working capital, equipment financing, lines of credit, invoice financing, alternative lending
- Abria prepares lender-ready applications before submission (differentiator from referral-only brokers)
- Not a bank, credit union, or direct lender
- Serves all of Canada with primary focus on Ontario and Durham Region
- Free initial assessment offered to all prospective clients
